case_title: RIEDEL, MICHELLE VS PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIEDEL, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA LAUREL PROPERTIES $827.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $827.00, THIS AWARD IS IN ADDITION TO THE CHECK FOR $373.87 TENDERED BY CHRISTINA PIEHOFF ON FEB. 6, 2006. THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LAUREL PROPERTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BY PRIORITY MAIL REC'D AND FILED ONLY. NO FILING FEE OF $10 ENCLOSED. DEFT NOTIFIED OF RETURN REQUEST.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,363.71 FILED BY PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RIEDEL, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTE: NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-15-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-13-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COURTESY COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT C. PIEHOFF TO PLTF M. RIEDEL RE FILING OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIEDEL, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA LAUREL PROPERTIES $827.35 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $827.35, THE AWARD IS IN ADDITION TO THE CHECK FOR $373.87 TENDERED BY CHRISTINA PIEHOFF ON FEB. 6, 2006. THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LAUREL PROPERTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA LAUREL PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RIEDEL, MICHELLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA LAUREL PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,410.00 FILED BY RIEDEL, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA LAUREL PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING-GRANTED TO 6/13/06.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PIEHOFF, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RIEDEL, MICHELLE $811.61 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $811.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
